title: Feature Root: Bead Telemetry Analysis
description: Shared execution root for delivering the telemetry subcommand, its aggregation/reporting behavior, test coverage, assistant skill documentation, and final review. This container bead is non-runnable and exists to coordinate the dependent implementation and follow-up work for spec `s-a0f0124`.
acceptance_criteria: `orchestrator telemetry` exists as a documented CLI subcommand and appears in help output.
Telemetry reporting supports filtering by days, feature root, agent type, and status.
Default output includes summary, agent-type aggregation, retry/block rates, and feature-root aggregation.
`--json` returns valid structured JSON for the filtered result set.
Automated tests cover filters, wall-clock computation, corrective/merge-conflict detection, JSON mode, and empty results.
A Claude skill documents when and how to use the telemetry command.
Implementation, tests, docs, and review are completed through the child beads below.
